headline: Anthropic surpasses OpenAI valuation as enterprise AI consolidation accelerates
body: Anthropic has reached a $965B valuation, becoming the most valuable AI firm and signaling major capital influx into the sector. Major investors including Apollo and Blackstone are mobilizing $36B specifically for AI chip acquisition, indicating serious commitment to infrastructure scaling. For healthcare AI specifically, this consolidation matters because it determines which LLM platforms will dominate clinical workflows, EHR integration, and regulatory compliance pathways. Vendors building on Anthropic's foundation versus competitors will face different technical roadmaps and partnership economics going forward. Healthcare systems evaluating AI solutions should track these valuation shifts as proxies for long-term viability and feature roadmap investment.
